title: ZA - tools
description: This mod adds some QoL tools like skythes and building hammers.
body:
This mod adds some usefull new tools to enchance your vanilla expirience.

This mod adds:
- **Skythes** Used to harvest crops more efficient. Also it replants them. Better the resourse more crops it harvests.
- **Hammers** Simple building tools. Build blocks in 3x3 area.
- **Obsidian tools** Between iron and diamond. Crafted using lava buckets and iron tools.
- **Other stone variant tools** Slightly better then stone tools. (Those useless stones have a new purpese now)
- **Amethyst tools** Fastest tools, even faster than golden tools. Also they can break randomly.
- **Cnuckles** Hits fast but less damage.
New enchantments:
- **Natures gift** Bigger the level of the enchantment more xp it gives for harvesting crops with skythe.
- **Sweeping** Make your new tools work in bigger radius.(like skythe harvest crops in bigger radius or hammers build 5x5)
